articles.title: Peace Gets a Time-Out Extension: Israel and Lebanon Agree to 3 More Weeks of Ceasefire
articles.summary: Have you ever had a fight with a friend and needed a break? That's kind of what's happening between Israel and Lebanon. They agreed to stop fighting for another three weeks! The leaders met at the White House with President Trump. But it's not all good news — a journalist was killed, and some people are still angry. Will this break lead to real peace?

articles.title: Mind Reader at the White House Dinner? Oz Pearlman Will Try to Trick Trump!
articles.summary: What would you do if someone could guess your secret number or read your thoughts? That's what mentalist Oz Pearlman does — and he's the star of this year's White House Correspondents' Dinner! Instead of a comedian roasting politicians, Pearlman will try to "read" President Trump's mind. He says it's "the most impressive thing you could ever do." Will he pull it off?

articles.title: Iran Says 'We Are One Soul' After Trump Claims Leaders Are Fighting Each Other
articles.summary: President Trump said Iran's leaders are fighting among themselves. But Iran's top officials — including the president and parliament speaker — all posted the exact same message: "We are one soul." They say the country is united, not divided. Why does this matter? Because if Iran's leaders are united, it might change how the U.S. deals with them. Trump also said the U.S. will "shoot and kill" anyone laying mines in the Strait of Hormuz.
